TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Dralendren ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 83 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 80 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Dralendren hya' ga Tjuabal. tay mkyahu' na Dralendren hya' ga Sinka. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dralendren ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dralendren ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *ralen*ren ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaβal. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ralen*ren ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinka. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Dralendren ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 83 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 80 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Dralendren hya' ga Tjuabal. tay mkyahu' na Dralendren hya' ga Sinka. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Dralendren ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Dralendren ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *ralen*ren ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaβal. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ralen*ren ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinka. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *ralen*ren ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
